posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title: Taxing remittances at 100% will be one of the easiest ways to make millions of people leave Britain and other European nations. Trump needs to bring in a remittance tax too. In fact, I’m surprised he hasn’t already.

quotedTweet.content:
The more immigrant the more money a country loses to remittances.

In 1997 when non-Brits were barely 9% of Britain's population remittance outflows were just $1.51 billion.

In 2024, when non-Brits were ~28% of Britain's population remittances outflows are ~12.27 billion.

twitter.content: Taxing remittances at 100% will be one of the easiest ways to make millions of people leave Britain and other European nations. Trump needs to bring in a remittance tax too. In fact, I’m surprised he hasn’t already.
